creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=0750606fdf95ef3f730902af6a203e575fcc64d1

commit 0750606fdf95ef3f730902af6a203e575fcc64d1
Author:     Charlie Li <vishwin@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2023-09-14 19:50:50 +0000
Commit:     Charlie Li <vishwin@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2023-09-14 22:00:50 +0000

    textproc/UCD and deskutils/gucharmap: update to 15.1.0

    Add comments about version sync requirement, and strengthen
    deskutils/gucharmap BUILD_DEPENDS version specifier.

    This also reverts commit 6ca002d89c860b63d4a925d30f1ed2a063aece91.

    Reported by:    olgeni
    PR:             273796
    Approved by:    vishwin (gnome, maintainer deskutils/gucharmap)
                    thierry (maintainer textproc/UCD)
